title: lathyrus alpestris var. regis-alexandri
intro: Lathyrus alpestris var. regis-alexandri is a variety of the Alpine peavine, a flowering plant in the pea family. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of Lathyrine, a toxin that can be neutralized and used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although its use should be approached with caution. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus alpestris var. regis-alexandri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used in traditional medicine under the guidance of a qualified practitioner.
